risk.desc: Potential misalignment during assembly due to lack of clear alignment keys.
risk.mit: Add alignment keys to the bolt_circle_dummy and bell_nozzle_shell_mount interfaces.

risk.desc: Risk of cable damage due to unsupported exits and sharp bends.
risk.mit: Implement strain relief geometry and ensure routing respects minimum bend radius.

risk.desc: Risk of mis-mating connectors due to lack of keying or labeling.
risk.mit: Ensure connectors are reachable and include keying or labeling to prevent mis-mating.

risk.desc: Risk of overclaiming functionality in educational display.
risk.mit: Clearly label all non-functional components and avoid implying real launch readiness.

risk.desc: Risk of uncontrolled assembly alignment without primary datum.
risk.mit: Define a primary datum feature (flat, bore, or pin) and place it explicitly.
